reproducibility: real repo + pinned vulnerable/patched SHAs; line-precise; pin-or-drop; explicitly verified deleted patched targets

seed.sink: paged_dropdown takes query from request.GET, interpolates it into a SQL template with str.format, then calls cursor.execute(sql) without bound parameters
seed.patched_shape: the query uses DB-API named placeholders and passes language/query values in a separate mapping argument to cursor.execute

heldout.sink: getLookupByOrderId concatenates its order_id parameter directly into a SELECT passed to the OpenCart database query method
heldout.patched_shape: the patched commit removes the Divido payment extension, including this exact target file; corpus_measure verifies the commit exists and the raw path returns 404

heldout.sink: build_graph_object_sql_having appends its filter parameter directly into a returned HAVING fragment
heldout.patched_shape: the filter value is wrapped by db_qstr('%' . $filter . '%') at the fragment-construction line

heldout.sink: the request sort value is interpolated into an HQL ORDER BY fragment used by services.query.hql
heldout.patched_shape: the fragment persists unchanged; the custom checkOrderBySafe call is reordered after the doc.location rewrite, a framework-specific control-flow fix expected to remain an honest static miss
